message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Game <<C>>

interface EnemyFactory <<I>> {
  + create(): AbstractAircraft
}

abstract class AbstractAircraft <<A>> {
  # maxHp:int
  # hp:int
  # kind:int
  + AbstractAircraft(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp):void
  + decreaseHp(int decrease):void
  + getHp():int
  + shoot():List<BaseBullet>
}

class EliteFactory <<C>> {
  + create():EliteEnemy
}

class BossFactory <<C>> {
  + create():BossEnemy
}

class MobFactory <<C>> {
  + create():MobEnemy
}

class EliteEnemy <<C>> {
  - shootNum:int
  - power:int
  - direction:int
  - kind:int
  + EliteEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp):void
  + forward():void
  + shoot():List<BaseBullet>
  + addProp():List<AbstractProp>
}

class BossEnemy <<C>> {
  - shootNum:int
  - power:int
  - direction:int
  - kind:int
  + BossEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp):void
  + forward():void
  + enemyKind():int
  + shoot():List<Bullet>
}

class MobEnemy <<C>> {
  + MobEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp):void
  + forward():void
  + kind():int
  + shoot():List<BaseBullet>
}

Game ..> EnemyFactory
Game ..> AbstractAircraft

EliteFactory ..|> EnemyFactory
BossFactory ..|> EnemyFactory
MobFactory ..|> EnemyFactory

EliteEnemy --|> AbstractAircraft
BossEnemy --|> AbstractAircraft
MobEnemy --|> AbstractAircraft

EliteFactory ..> EliteEnemy : create
BossFactory ..> BossEnemy : create
MobFactory ..> MobEnemy : create
@enduml
